who: paralegals in small law firms processing 5–15 client intake forms/month
offer: For paralegals in small law firms processing 5–15 client intake forms/month, inefficient summarization causes delays in case preparation. We automate the formatting of case management summaries instead of manual summarization of client intake forms.
problem: Inefficient summarization of client intake forms
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for paralegals seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflow challenges
DM outreach to paralegals with a demo video
Engage in community forums for paralegals sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual input and summary generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing client data
Enable one-click export of summary reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
